name: SDWB2 Movie Bot
description: Premium Telegram Movie Bot with Streaming, Dashboard, and Auto-Notifications

SESSION_STRING.description: Pyrogram user session string (generate with gen_session.py)

OWNER_ID.description: Telegram User ID of the bot owner

DATABASE_CHANNEL.description: Comma-separated channel IDs used as file database (e.g. -1001234567890)

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the admin dashboard at /dashboard

TMDB_API_KEY.description: TMDb API key for movie posters/ratings. Get free at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api

UPDATE_CHANNEL.description: Username of your public update channel (e.g. sdmoviepointes)

VALIDITY.description: Comma-separated validity periods in seconds for premium groups

SHORTENER_API.description: Shortener API key for monetizing links (optional)

RESULTS_HOW_TO_DOWNLOAD_LINK.description: URL for How to Download guide shown in search results

REQUEST_MOVIE_URL.description: URL for Request Movie button (e.g. your request channel link)
